title: Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) Tests: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
. Nirsevimab and palivizumab are two medicines that have antibodies Â (proteins specifically made to attack bacteria or a virus) against RSV. 
Consider an RSV vaccination (as recommended by your provider) if you are pregnant, an older adult (age 75 years and older), or age 60-74 with a weaker immune system.
